response.global_analysis: The video consists of a credits roll and a closing message. There are no vocal songs; only an instrumental background track plays. I am transcribing the English closing message that appears on-screen from 00:43.000 to the end of the video, as requested by the Secondary Priority for relevant on-screen text.
